roa.docketEntryComment: Warrant - Bench Warrant Return 09/08/23 FTA BENCH WARRANT STAY
Promise to Appear on Court Own Recognizance
Court Orders Bench Warrant Stayed Lifted

/CAL:PRC PROGRESS REPORT/X:PAROLEE SERGIO CORTEZ - APPEARANCE WAIVED TODAY/DAWT/X:JUDGE ROECA AND PD IN THE COURTROOM/X:DA AND PAROLE AGENT ROBERTABAKAN VIA ZOOM/X:PAROLEE DOING WELL/CONTD: PRC PROGRESS REPORT/

/CAL:PROC RE BW/X:THE PAROLEE IS IN CUSTODY,/X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGARAPPEARING,/CTORD:THE PAROLEE REMANDED IN TO CUSTODY NUNC PRO TUNC TO 02-24-22/NB/X:BENCH WARRANT WAS STAYED TO THIS DATE,/BWSTAY:02-22-22/X:CLERICAL ERROR IN ACES SHOWS BENCH WARRANT ISSUED ON 02-24-22, BUT NO ACTIVE BENCH WARRANT IN CMS,/BWR:02-24-22/CONTD:CUSTODY STATUS/
